metadata.description: Minimal Claude marketplace for exercising fully interchangeable Cowork mise shims

plugins.name: sa-mise
plugins.description: Primary peer Cowork fixture whose SessionStart hook invokes the local mise shim through ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/mise

plugins.name: sa-mise-session-start-a
plugins.description: Peer Cowork fixture whose SessionStart hook prepends its own bin directory to PATH before invoking bare mise

plugins.name: sa-mise-session-start-b
plugins.description: Peer Cowork fixture whose SessionStart hook resolves the sibling sa-mise plugin and invokes its mise shim directly

plugins.name: sa-mise-session-start-c
plugins.description: Peer Cowork fixture whose UserPromptSubmit hook relies on env inherited from sa-mise SessionStart exports
